title: A cross-country study of fairness and infringement on freedom as determinants of car owners’ acceptance of road pricing
authors: Satoshi Fujii, Tommy Gärling, Cecilia Jakobsson, Rong-Chang Jou

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Per-km charging/tolls are pricing measures, not a carbon, gasoline, diesel, or fuel tax.

inclusion_reason: Studies acceptance of road pricing, but no carbon or fuel tax is analyzed.
exclusion_reason: The policy object is road pricing/toll charging, not a direct carbon or fuel tax.
